heres an outline of how to approach this

1 create a list of all available discs that havent been assigned yet this includes all discs with positive values ie those whose values are greater than zero

2 use a stack to keep track of the remaining discs that havent been assigned yet each disc in the stack represents a disc that hasnt been assigned yet

3 iterate through the stack in reverse order from bottom to top

    pop the last disc from the stack
    check if the pop disc has a positive value and hasnt been assigned yet if so assign it to blue
    if the pop disc has a negative value and hasnt been assigned yet assign it to yellow
    push the next disc in the stack onto the stack
    continue iterating until the stack is empty

4 after iterating through all the discs check the total scores for both players assign the higher score to blue

5 return the json object containing the results for both players
